characters.name: Air Bud
characters.description: Air BudCharacter informationReal NameBuddySpeciesGolden RetrieverGenderMale ♂AppearancesDebutAppleton[source] Air Budis a residual plot hole from afterRand'sattempted use ofProject Reboot. Air Bud is a Golden Retriever with a smile and a long tongue. As he gets smarter he begins walking on two legs instead of four.

characters.name: Alpha-Beta
characters.description: PresidentCharacter informationReal NamePresidentNickname(s)PresidentAB (by Reagan)SpeciesSentient A.I.AffiliationCognito, Inc.StatusSentientLikesFriendsGenocideAppearancesDebut"Unpresidented"[source]President, formerlyROBOTUS, is an AI-powered robot created byReagan Ridleyto replace the U.S. President. He turned rogue after gaining self-awareness. Alpha-Beta was designed to be a puppet ofCognito Inc.when the real President was too dumb to manipulate. After being sabotaged byRand Ridley, President malfunctioned minutes upon deployment, becoming an hyper-militaristic ultra nationalist, described by Reagan as "jingoistic". Somehow, this also led him to achievesingularity. To stop his ensuing plans of separating the USA from the rest of the world, Reagan connected him to the Internet, hereafter he abandoned his nationalism in favor of a genocidal urge to cleanse the planet of humans. This set off a head-on confrontation between him and the two present Cognito Inc. employees, Reagan and Brett.

characters.name: Andre Lee
characters.description: Dr. Andre LeeCharacter informationNickname(s)Stoner(byMyc)Commie-hippie-junkie-pinko-pansexual-ambiguously ethnic(byGlenn Dolphman)SpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AffiliationCognito Inc.OccupationBiochemist atCognito, Inc.(currently)StatusAliveLikesDrugsBreaking BadThe gangDislikesBeing soberThe gang (at times)Being called the drug guyAppearancesDebut"Unpresidented"Latest"Appleton"Voiced byBobby Lee[source]Dr. Andre Leeis a biochemist atCognito Inc.. He  is shown to self-medicate his disorders through drugs, and generally also enjoys drugs recreationally. He is shown to like Breaking Bad (he uses a mind eraser to forget the ending), and knows both Latin and Korean. characters.name: Bear-O
characters.description: Bear-OCharacter informationSpeciesRobotGenderMale ♂OccupationCaretakerLikesHuggingReaganAppearancesDebut"Blue Bloods"[source]Bear-Ois the robot designed and built byRand Ridleyfor his daughterReagan. It was created as a "caretaker" and "best friend" for Reagan during her childhood. Its design was based on the design of a teddy bear. Bear-O is a large robot with a head of a teddy bear. He eggshell white paint job has a blue trim, grey circle on his stomach and dark grey waste. He has a bulky build and tank treads in place of legs. Decades later after being rebuilt Bear-O is now covered in dents, some of his body parts are rusted, has light grey metal plate patching up the upper right side of his torso and the blue part of his left shoulder joint is missing Bear-O was created with the purpose of keeping Reagan happy, however it backfired as a result of Rand's poor understanding of people and lack of interactions with real people. The robot brought the child Reagan fear and would become one of her many sources of trauma and social awkwardness. It appears that the robot wasn't future-proofed for an adult's mindset, since it is near impossible for it to tell the difference between what a child needs and what an adult needs.

characters.name: Buzz Aldrin
characters.description: Buzz AldrinCharacter informationReal NameEdwin Eugene Aldrin Jr.Nickname(s)Moon KingSpeciesHumanHomeMoonGenderMale ♂AffiliationNASA (formerly)OccupationAstronaut(formerly)Leader of rouge moon colony(formerly)StatusAliveDislikesEarthAppearancesDebut"Buzzkill"[source] Buzz Aldrinis a NASA astronaut who was one of the first to set foot on theMoon. While the people ofEarthwere led to believe he had returned with Neil Armstrong to his home planet (thanks to the actorMelvin Stupowitztaking his place), Aldrin actually stayed on the Moon where he built a seemingly utopian colony. The Moon's low gravity has also aged him much slower than on Earth. ReaganandBrettgo on a dangerous mission to the Moon to check out a distress call. They arrive and are amazed at the advanced city built there led by Buzz Aldrin. This is interrupted whenRandarrives at the Moon, annoying Reagan who simply wanted space from him. When Rand confronts Buzz about sleeping withTamiko, Reagan begins to wonder if that Buzz Aldrin is her real father. Rand and Brett go to the original Moon landing site and discover that Neil Armstrong was murdered, leading them both to worry about Reagan's safety.

characters.name: Dietrich Kluge
characters.description: Dietrich KlugeCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AffiliationIlluminatiOccupationHead of the IlluminatiStatusAliveAppearancesDebutHow Reagan Got Her Grove BackLatestAppleton[source] Dietrich Klugeis the supreme leader of theIlluminatiand has a major rivalry withRand Ridley. Not much is known about Dietrich’s early life, but according to Rand he is over one thousand years old. Because of this he was probably born in the 12th century (1100’s). At an unknown point in time, he assumed control of the Illuminati and led it according to the Shadow Board’s will.

characters.name: Elliot Mothman
characters.description: Elliot MothmanCharacter informationSpeciesMothmanGenderMale ♂AffiliationCognito, Inc.OccupationInhuman ResourcesAppearancesDebut"Unpresidented"Voiced byRon Funches[source] Elliot Mothmanis an employee ofCognito Inc.'sInhuman Resourcesdepartment. He seems to be in the middle of his Masters' dissertation. In the episode "Blue Bloods", he is tasked with teaching the gang how to properly and politely address theReptoids. At one point, he kicksAndreandMycout of the room due to them only being interested in the Reptoid's orgies.

characters.name: Elliot Mothman

characters.name: Gigi Thompson
characters.description: Gigi ThompsonCharacter informationNickname(s)Gigi-moneyAlpha Sister Wife(byMyc)Gigi Luigi(byMyc)SpeciesHumanGenderFemale ♀OccupationHead of PR & Media Manipulation DepartmentStatusAliveLikesFashionSocial MediaWorking for the Illuminati (formerly)DislikesThe IlluminatiAppearancesDebut"Unpresidented"Latest"Appleton"[source]Gigi Thompsonis one of the main characters of the show. She is the head of the PR and Media Manipulation department and part of "The Gang". Gigi is a beautiful black woman, with a slim and curvaceous body, and defined cheek bones. Her hair is shoulder-length, straight, black hair transitioning to maroon, curling at the end, usually. She is seen wearing make-up often. usually maroon/purple eye shadow and a bold red/maroon lip. Her work outfit is an orange-red pencil-skirt, with a matching suit jacket with the sleeves rolled up. She wears a leopard top under it. She accessorizes the outfit with gold hoop earrings, a gold plain bangle bracelet on her right arm, two gold bangle bracelets on her left arm, a gold necklace, and a red shiny buckle belt. Additionally, she wears maroon platform pumps. When she and Myc are handling bets, she adds a clear, green-colored plastic visor, with a white strap.

characters.name: Glenn Dolphman
characters.description: Glenn DolphmanCharacter informationReal NameGlenn DolphmanNickname(s)Old Guy(byMyc)SpeciesHuman(formerly)Dolphin-human hybridHomeWashington, D.CGenderMale ♂AffiliationCognito Inc.OccupationU.S. Army General (formerly)Head ofCognito, Inc.armsFamilyDolores (ex-wife)Unnamed daughterUnnamed other kid/childrenStatusAliveLikesThe United States of AmericaThe MilitaryDislikesRussians/RuskiesReptoidsAppearancesDebut"Unpresidented"Voiced byJohn DiMaggio[source]Glenn Dolphmanis an employee ofCognito, Inc.. He is responsible for managing the company's arsenal. He has a second identity as Chad Dallas, a trendy Gen Z student, for an operation to enlist teens into the Military. Glenn is a former service member of the United States military. He is stated to be a high-ranking general. He has served in many armed conflicts, including the Vietnam War, the Second Gulf War, and the Kosovo War. At an unknown point in his life, he married a woman named Dolores and had a daughter with her, but their marriage didn't last long. During his employment in Cognito, Inc., he allowedAndre Leeto perform a surgery on him that turned him into a dolphin-human super soldier. As a result, he can communicate with marine animals. He was born in 1970/1971. Glenn is very patriotic and would do anything for the United States of America. However, he is also shown to be a hypocrite. For example, he despises the Reptoids for being half-human and half-animal, even though he is a hybrid himself. He is very out-of-touch with modern society and acts entitled regarding his status as a high-ranking Military officer.

characters.name: Grassy Noel Atkinson
characters.description: Grassy Noel AtkinsonCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AffiliationCognito Inc.OccupationAssassinAppearancesDebut"Clone Gunman"Voiced byAlex Hirsch[source]Grassy Noel Atkinsonis the assassin ofJohn F. Kennedy, the 35th president of theUnited States, and an employee ofCognito Inc.. Grassy wears a dark green beret, a blue dress shirt under a turquoise V-neck sweater with light brown khaki pants. He has a steel blue coat over all of this. He wears glasses with wrapped black frames.

Scheimpough's yacht. In "My Big Flat Earth Wedding", Harold jumped into the portal of Hollow Earth. Whether he is alive or dead is unknown.

characters.name: J.R. Scheimpough
characters.description: J.R. ScheimpoughCharacter informationNickname(s)J-Money (by Brett)The World's Biggest Asshole (by Rand)SpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AffiliationCognito Inc.(formerly)OccupationCEO ofCognito Inc.(formerly)Intern (formerly)Prisoner at Shadow Prison X (currently)StatusAliveLikesMoneyBeing in chargeAppearancesDebut"Unpresidented"Voiced byAndrew Daly[source]J.R. Scheimpoughis a major antagonist inInside Job. He is the former CEO ofCognito Inc., as well as the former business partner and archenemy,Rand Ridley. He is currently incarcerated inShadow Prison Xwith Rand, being deemed a traitor by theShadow Boardfor attempting to use "Project Reboot" to his advantage.  J.R. attended Harvard university in the 70's where he metRand. While initially annoyed that Rand was better (but lazier) than him at everything, he and J.R. became friends. OpeningCognito Inc.together. They stayed friends throughout the years with J.R. seeing Rand get married and havingReagan. However, by the start of the series they have fallen out.

characters.name: Jeff Bezos
characters.description: Jeff BezosCharacter informationReal NameJeffrey Preston BezosSpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AffiliationAmazon.com, Inc.OccupationBillionaireStatusDeceasedAppearancesDebut"My Big Flat Earth Wedding"[source]Jeffrey Preston Bezos(/ˈbeɪzoʊs/ BAY-zohss;néJorgensen; born January 12, 1964-2021) was an American entrepreneur, media proprietor, investor, computer engineer, and commercial astronaut. He was the founder, executive chairman, and former president and CEO of Amazon. With a net worth of US$112.5 billion as of November 2021, Bezos was the fourth-wealthiest (formerly first) person in the world and was the wealthiest from 2017 to 2021 according to both Bloomberg's Billionaires Index and Forbes. He died when a large Kraken ate his yacht.

characters.name: Jeff Bezos
characters.description: Jeff BezosCharacter informationReal NameJeffrey Preston BezosSpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AffiliationAmazon.com, Inc.OccupationBillionaireStatusDeceasedAppearancesDebut"My Big Flat Earth Wedding"[source]Jeffrey Preston Bezos(/ˈbeɪzoʊs/ BAY-zohss;néJorgensen; born January 12, 1964-2021) was an American entrepreneur, media proprietor, investor, computer engineer, and commercial astronaut. He was the founder, executive chairman, and former president and CEO of Amazon. With a net worth of US$112.5 billion as of November 2021, Bezos was the fourth-wealthiest (formerly first) person in the world and was the wealthiest from 2017 to 2021 according to both Bloomberg's Billionaires Index and Forbes. He died when a large Kraken ate his yacht.

characters.name: Keanu Reeves
characters.description: Keanu ReevesCharacter informationSpeciesVampireGenderMale ♂AffiliationIlluminatiOccupationActorAppearancesDebut"Whoas-Feratu"Voiced byRoger Craig Smith[source]Keanu Reevesis a scientifically created vampire and actor employed bythe Illuminati. Keanu is described (in reference) byGigi Thompsonas looking "vaguely Asian, but not in a way that threatens middle America". He has a tall, slim figure, with a long, slender face, prominent cheekbones, and narrow eyes. As a vampire, he has fangs, which become visible when he is either feeding or injured. He has shoulder-length dark hair, a mustache, soul patch, and a five-o'clock shadow. He appears to have kept this appearance in some form or another for centuries, only breaking the look around 1992 when he opted for shorter, slicked-back hair and a clean shave. Keanu is usually dressed in a gray sweater with a black sport coat worn overtop, with dark gray pants and brown Oxford dress shoes. At his movie premiere, Keanu wore an all-charcoal three-piece suit and tie, strongly resembling the attire of his John Wick character.

characters.name: Kevin, Charlie, Ashley, and Lamar
characters.description: Kevin, Charlie, Ashley, and LamarCharacter informationSpeciesHumanAppearancesDebut"The Brettfast Club"Voiced byKate Micucci (Charlie)Darius Johnson (Lamer)[source]Kevin, Charlie, Ashley, and Lamarare a group of kids who live inStill Valley. While on a mission, Myc falls from the plane and gets Amnesia. He is found by a group of children who take him to Kevin's house. They welcome him and let stay, but they later become annoyed of him. After bantering they threw Myc off a cliff, where he lands on the van, Gigi, Andre, and Glenn were driving. They later arrive to say goodbye to Myc, who pushed Kevin off his bike as payback for throwing him off a cliff.

characters.name: Lin-Manuel Miranda
characters.description: Lin-Manuel MirandaCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AffiliationThe IlluminatiOccupationPlaywrightStatusAliveAppearancesVoiced byEric Bauza[source] Lin-Manuel Mirandais a member of theIlluminati. Lin-Manuel Miranda is the Tony Award winning playwright ofIn The HeightsandHamilton, which propelled him to international stardom. He is in the inner circle of the Illuminati, and was specifically responsible for rejectingGigi'sapplications.

characters.description: Lin-Manuel MirandaCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AffiliationThe IlluminatiOccupationPlaywrightStatusAliveAppearancesVoiced byEric Bauza[source] Lin-Manuel Mirandais a member of theIlluminati. Lin-Manuel Miranda is the Tony Award winning playwright ofIn The HeightsandHamilton, which propelled him to international stardom. He is in the inner circle of the Illuminati, and was specifically responsible for rejectingGigi'sapplications.

characters.name: Melvin Stupowitz
characters.description: Melvin StupowitzCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AppearancesDebut"Buzzkill"Voiced byHenry Winkler[source]Melvin Stupowitzis a crisis actor who playsBuzz Aldrin. Due to bringing back Buzz Aldrin from the moon, Gigi and Andre Lee tells Melvin that he’s fired and to show up atCognito Inc.to get a new face. Instead of that, Melvin decides to go onThe Tonight Showto reveal his secret. After finally catching up to him, they learned that Buzz Aldrin has escaped the moon, so that means that Melvin gets to keep his job.

characters.name: Myc Cellium
characters.description: Magic MycCharacter informationReal NameMyc CelliumGenderGenderless øOccupationSpore supplier atCognito Inc.(currently)StatusAliveLikesBeing milkedCursingPlaying the keyboardDislikesThe HiveThe group (sometimes)AppearancesDebut"Unpresidented"Latest"Appleton"[source]Myc Cellium, also known asMagic Mycor justMyc, is a psychicmushroom-like organismfrom a hive mind deep insideHollow Earth. They have a dry, sarcastic demeanor and the ability to read peoples' minds. Their species is responsible for giving humanity intelligence by offering their spores to ancient apes for consumption. They are voiced by Brett Gelman. Myc is the only one of the main group who appears totally unhuman. They have six blue tentacles at the bottom of their body that they use to move and grab things, appearing to be able to move just as efficiently as humans. The blood of their tentacles also acts as a strong simulating drug. Their tentacles also appear to be their main gateway to his psychic powers of mind reading.

characters.name: Orrin Carthwait
characters.description: Orrin CarthwaitCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AppearancesDebut"Inside Reagan"[source]Orrin Carthwaitis the childhood friend ofReagan Ridleyuntil he was erased from her memory by her fatherRand Ridley Since Reagan exhibited a lot of technological genius similar to his at an early age, Rand made her skip the rest of elementary and middle school in her fourth grade, which involved erasing her memories of her only friend, Orrin Carthwait, so she wouldn't be held back by their friendship from graduating as soon as possible and joining him atCognito, Inc.to preserve his influence over her and so she can become his insurance policy in case he was ever fired byJ.R..

characters.name: Rafe Masters
characters.description: Rafe MastersCharacter informationSpeciesHumanGenderMale ♂AffiliationSecret Intelligence Service (SIS)Military Intelligence, Section 6 (MI6)Cognito Inc.(temporary)OccupationAgent for MI6StatusAliveAppearancesDebut"My Big Flat Earth Wedding"Latest"Ghost Protocol"Voiced byJosh Robert Thompson[source] Rafe Mastersis an agent of the British intelligence agency MI6. He first appeared in "My Big Flat Earth Wedding" after being contacted as backup following a pirate hijacking ofTamiko Ridley'swedding. He later played a major role in"Ghost Protocol" asReagan Ridley'semotionally insecure one-night stand. He is voiced by Josh Robert Thompson.
